response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and engineering leadership at the required scale.
strengths: Experience with diverse technologies and programming languages
Background in fintech and AI-related projects
Strong open-source contributions and personal projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI architecture
Not enough experience in engineering leadership at scale
Limited experience in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct agentic AI experience
